summary: Comprehensive testing of OT Relacionada feature and Dieta calculation in Folha de Horas PDF. All tests passed - both backend API and frontend UI verified.
seed_data_creation: Used existing OT #356 (id: 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85) and OT #361 (id: 0f6b59bc-c2ae-4561-b4f3-199fee8e7800) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: OT Relacionada feature fully implemented and verified. OT #361 has ot_relacionada_id pointing to OT #356. OT #356 shows 'Posterior: #361' badge. Price table 1 ('2024') has valor_dieta=50.0. Dieta calculation follows business rule: ≤4h=0€, 4h-6h=50%, >6h=100% of valor_dieta.

verified: OT #361 shows 'OT #356' badge in blue in the OT list card
OT #356 shows 'Posterior: #361' badge in amber in the OT list card
OT #361 detail modal shows 'OT Relacionada: OT #356' in Dados do Cliente section
OT #356 detail modal shows 'OT Posterior: OT #361' in Dados do Cliente section
data-testid='ot-relacionada-ref' exists and contains correct text
data-testid='ot-posterior-ref' exists and contains correct text
'+ Nova OT' button opens creation modal
'OT Relacionada (opcional)' dropdown field exists with data-testid='ot-relacionada-select'
Dropdown lists all existing OTs with format: OT #XXX - ClientName (Date)
Default value is 'Nenhuma'
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos returns ot_relacionada_id and ot_relacionada_numero
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos returns ots_posteriores array for parent OTs
OT #361 correctly references OT #356 (ot_relacionada_id = 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85)
OT #356 correctly shows OT #361 in ots_posteriores array
OT PDF includes 'OT Relacionada: OT #XXX' when relationship exists
Folha de Horas PDF includes 'OT Relacionada: OT #XXX' in header
Price table 1 ('2024') has valor_dieta=50.0
Dieta calculation business rule implemented in folha_horas_pdf.py lines 326-355
Rule: ≤4h work = 0€ dieta
Rule: 4h-6h work = 50% of valor_dieta (25€)
Rule: >6h work = 100% of valor_dieta (50€)
Dieta applied per technician per day (not duplicated)
POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-pdf with table_id=1 generates valid PDF
GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-horas-data returns tabelas_preco with valor_dieta
PDF saved to /app/test_reports/folha_horas_ot356.pdf for inspection

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/ot_list_view.png - OT list showing #361 with 'OT #356' badge and #356 with 'Posterior: #361' badge
.screenshots/ot361_detail.png - OT #361 detail modal showing 'OT Relacionada: OT #356'
.screenshots/ot356_detail.png - OT #356 detail modal showing 'OT Posterior: OT #361'
